description: 20-job benchmark dataset for hiring simulation evaluation

labels.interview_worthy: Jobs that match the sample resume profile well (should be shortlisted)
labels.reject: Jobs that should be filtered out or ranked low

interview_worthy.description: Mid-sized manufacturing company seeking AI Engineer to develop predictive maintenance solutions. 3-5 years experience required.
interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Perfect match: location, skills, experience level, mid-sized company

interview_worthy.description: Growing agricultural technology company needs ML Engineer to build crop prediction models. Remote-friendly.
interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Strong match: Iowa location, agricultural domain experience, skills align

interview_worthy.description: Healthcare network seeking Senior AI Engineer for NLP applications. 4+ years experience.
interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Experience in healthcare NLP, location in preferred region, experience matches

interview_worthy.description: 200-employee manufacturing firm needs ML Engineer for quality control systems.
interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Computer vision experience, Midwest location, mid-sized company

interview_worthy.description: Regional insurance company building AI team. Looking for ML Engineer with 3+ years experience.
interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Nebraska in preferred locations, skills match, mid-sized company

interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Strong skills match, Midwest location, practical ML application

interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Remote option, NLP experience, customer service chatbot project aligns

interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Minnesota in preferred locations, MLflow experience, mid-sized

interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Fraud detection experience from internship, financial domain, Midwest

interview_worthy.description: Agricultural company using AI for crop analysis. 100+ employees, growth stage.
interview_worthy.reason_interview_worthy: Agricultural yield prediction project aligns, Nebraska location, CV skills

evaluation_metrics.precision_at_10: Number of interview-worthy jobs in top 10 / 10
evaluation_metrics.interview_yield: Number of 'Yes' interview decisions from human raters / total rated
